chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA Nos.92 and 93 of 2016 Merck (Private) Limited Versus Deputy Commissioner Inland Revenue Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case Dated: 17.11.2021 Mr. Sami-ur-Rehman Khan holds brief for Mr. Hyder Ali Khan for applicants. -.-.- Learned counsel holding brief for Mr. Hyder Ali Khan has been instructed through his client not to press these Income Tax Reference Applications, which are accordingly dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge
